summary: Palantir's official TypeScript OSDK (Ontology SDK) — a pnpm monorepo (~75 packages) providing typed access to the Palantir Ontology. The SDK defines five core Ontology concepts as TypeScript types (ObjectTypeDefinition, ActionDefinition, QueryDefinition, InterfaceDefinition, LinkType), implements a functional client pattern for interacting with them, and includes a code generator that produces typed SDK packages from Foundry Ontology metadata. Version 2.8.0-beta.7, Apache 2.0 licensed.

ontologyConcepts.evidence: ObjectTypeDefinition interface with apiName, primaryKeyApiName, primaryKeyType, titleProperty, properties (Record<string, ObjectMetadata.Property>), links (Record<string, ObjectMetadata.Link>), status, visibility, interfaceMap, and implements fields. ObjectMetadata.Property defines per-property schema with type, multiplicity, nullable, readonly, displayName, description, valueTypeApiName, and valueFormatting.

ObjectMetadata.Property interface defines individual property schemas with WirePropertyTypes (string, datetime, double, boolean, integer, timestamp, short, long, float, decimal, byte, marking, mediaReference, numericTimeseries, stringTimeseries, sensorTimeseries, attachment, geopoint, geoshape, geotimeSeriesReference, vector). Properties support multiplicity (array vs single), nullable, readonly flags, and declarative formatting rules via PropertyValueFormattingRule.

ObjectMetadata.Link interface defines relationships between Object Types with targetType (apiName of target ObjectTypeDefinition) and multiplicity (false = single, true = multiple). Links are accessed at runtime via $link property on Osdk instances, returning SingleLinkAccessor<T> for single links or ObjectSet<T> for multi-links. Links support type-safe traversal through OsdkObjectLinksObject<T>.

ActionDefinition interface with apiName, parameters (Record<string, ActionMetadata.Parameter>), modifiedEntities (which objects are created/modified), status, rid, description, displayName. ActionMetadata.Parameter supports types: boolean, string, integer, long, double, datetime, timestamp, attachment, marking, mediaReference, objectType, geoshape, geohash, plus complex types (Object references, ObjectSets, Interfaces, Structs). Actions return ActionEditResponse or ActionValidationResponse.

QueryDefinition interface with apiName, parameters (Record<string, QueryParameterDefinition>), output (QueryDataTypeDefinition), version (semver), description, displayName. Output types include Primitives, Objects, ObjectSets, Interfaces, Sets, Unions, Structs, Aggregations, Maps, Arrays. Queries are invoked as functions on the client: client(QueryDefinition)({ param1: value }).

InterfaceDefinition interface similar to ObjectTypeDefinition but without primary key. Adds implementedBy (which object types implement the interface), links (Record<string, InterfaceMetadata.Link>), and supports polymorphic queries/actions. Objects declare implements array and interfaceMap mapping interface properties to object properties.

Not directly modeled in the TypeScript SDK type system — access control is handled server-side in Foundry. The SDK exposes status (ACTIVE, EXPERIMENTAL, DEPRECATED, ENDORSED) and visibility (NORMAL, PROMINENT, HIDDEN) metadata on definitions, which may be role-dependent.

Not explicitly modeled as a first-class type definition. May be handled via derived properties (DerivedProperty, WithPropertiesAggregationOptions) and property selection ($select on fetchPage). The ObjectSet API provides aggregate() and groupBy() which serve view-like functionality.

apiSurface.name: createClient
apiSurface.description: Initialize an OSDK client instance with configuration (auth, stack URL). Returns a callable Client interface.

apiSurface.name: Client
apiSurface.description: Functional client callable with definitions — client(ObjectTypeDef) returns ObjectSet, client(ActionDef) returns action executor, client(QueryDef) returns query executor.

apiSurface.name: ObjectSet<T>
apiSurface.description: Fluent collection API for querying objects. Supports fetchPage(), where(filter), aggregate(opts), async iteration, and type-safe property selection via $select.

apiSurface.name: Osdk.Instance<T>
apiSurface.description: Runtime object instance with OsdkBase properties ($apiName, $primaryKey, $objectSpecifier, $objectType, $title) plus selected properties and $link accessor for relationship traversal.

apiSurface.name: WhereClause / Filter types
apiSurface.description: Type-safe filtering: StringFilter, NumberFilter, DatetimeFilter, GeoFilter, BooleanFilter, ArrayFilter. Compose with WhereClause for ObjectSet.where().

apiSurface.name: AggregateOpts / AggregationsResults
apiSurface.description: Aggregation API with GroupByClause support. Results typed per aggregation operation.

apiSurface.name: fetchMetadata
apiSurface.description: Retrieve full Ontology metadata at runtime from Foundry for a given definition.

apiSurface.name: foundry-sdk-generator
apiSurface.description: Code generator CLI that reads Ontology metadata from Foundry and generates typed TypeScript SDK packages with object/action/query definitions.

architecturePatterns: Type-First Design: Heavy TypeScript generics ensure compile-time safety — definitions serve as both types and runtime values
Functional Client Pattern: Single callable Client interface (not class-based) — client(Definition) returns the appropriate accessor
Metadata-Driven Generation: Code generator reads wire-format Ontology metadata from Foundry and produces typed SDK packages
ObjectSet as Collection: Fluent, chainable API (where/aggregate/fetchPage/async iterate) similar to LINQ/streams
Generated vs Runtime Separation: @osdk/api provides pure type definitions, @osdk/client provides runtime implementations, generated code combines both
Multi-target Compilation: transpileEsm (node/browser), transpileBrowser (browser-optimized), transpileCjs (CommonJS), transpileTypes (declarations only)
Link Navigation: Type-safe relationship traversal via $link accessor returning SingleLinkAccessor or ObjectSet depending on multiplicity
Property Selection: $select pattern on fetchPage for partial loading, similar to GraphQL field selection

typeDefinitions.name: ObjectTypeDefinition
typeDefinitions.definition: interface { apiName, primaryKeyApiName, primaryKeyType, titleProperty, properties: Record<string, ObjectMetadata.Property>, links: Record<string, ObjectMetadata.Link>, icon, status, visibility, interfaceMap, implements }
typeDefinitions.purpose: Core type defining an Object Type in the Ontology — the fundamental data entity with properties and relationships

typeDefinitions.name: ActionDefinition
typeDefinitions.definition: interface { apiName, parameters: Record<string, ActionMetadata.Parameter>, modifiedEntities, status, rid, description, displayName }
typeDefinitions.purpose: Defines an Action Type — an operation that can modify Object Types with typed parameters

typeDefinitions.name: QueryDefinition
typeDefinitions.definition: interface { apiName, parameters: Record<string, QueryParameterDefinition>, output: QueryDataTypeDefinition, version, description, displayName }
typeDefinitions.purpose: Defines a Function/Query — a read-only computation with typed inputs and outputs

typeDefinitions.name: InterfaceDefinition
typeDefinitions.definition: interface { apiName, implementedBy, links: Record<string, InterfaceMetadata.Link>, properties }
typeDefinitions.purpose: Defines an Interface — a polymorphic abstraction over Object Types, enabling cross-type queries

typeDefinitions.name: ObjectMetadata.Property
typeDefinitions.definition: interface { readonly?, displayName?, description?, type: WirePropertyTypes, multiplicity?, nullable?, valueTypeApiName?, valueFormatting? }
typeDefinitions.purpose: Per-property schema defining type, display metadata, and formatting rules

typeDefinitions.name: WirePropertyTypes
typeDefinitions.definition: union: string | datetime | double | boolean | integer | timestamp | short | long | float | decimal | byte | marking | mediaReference | numericTimeseries | stringTimeseries | sensorTimeseries | attachment | geopoint | geoshape | geotimeSeriesReference | vector
typeDefinitions.purpose: Exhaustive set of property value types supported by the Ontology wire protocol

typeDefinitions.name: OsdkBase<Q>
typeDefinitions.purpose: Base interface for all loaded Ontology object instances with identity and metadata fields

typeDefinitions.name: ObjectSet<Q>
typeDefinitions.definition: interface extends BaseObjectSet { fetchPage(), fetchPageWithErrors(), where(filter), aggregate(opts), [Symbol.asyncIterator] }
typeDefinitions.purpose: Collection API for querying and iterating Object Type instances with filtering, aggregation, and pagination

dependencies: conjure-lite — Wire protocol serialization (Palantir's Conjure format)
fetch-retry — HTTP retry logic for resilient API calls
ws / isomorphic-ws — WebSocket support for real-time subscriptions
fast-deep-equal — Deep object comparison for change detection
ts-morph — TypeScript AST manipulation for code generation
